acceptance_criteria.description: The check-run wait helper succeeds only when every required named check for the requested head SHA has completed successfully, and it reports timeout and failure states clearly.
Referee artifact selection resolves the correct successful Claude Referee Review run for the requested PR head instead of relying on first-match ordering.
Deterministic local tests cover rerun and multi-match edge cases for the hosted check-run polling and referee-artifact selection helpers.

edge_cases.description: Missing required checks keep polling until timeout instead of producing a false success.
A newer completed-but-failed required check overrides an older passing run and fails the helper.
Expired or mismatched referee artifacts are rejected instead of being treated as valid Checker inputs.
